issues.sample: Merging into a highway vehicle lost power.  Wouldn’t accelerate above 50 mph.  Had multiple warning come on the dash, power lost, hybrid system failure, park daisy failure.   Turned my hazards on a proceeded to safety.  Definitely nerve racking,  wouldn’t want this to happen when

narrative.headline: What 2023 Toyota Tundra owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 365 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (40% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
